decisive_test: comm-blind control (paired, same-init survival-fitness vs random-fitness reproduction)
interpretation: The naive pre-registered gate-bundle declares 'RTC_G1F_CHANNEL_COEVOLVES' (all gates pass; shared-weights-kin MII rises to 0.183). But the architecture+process-matched comm-blind control reaches the same MII range (survival-fitness 0.172 vs comm-blind-fitness 0.127; paired survival-minus-commblind margin +0.045, 95% CI [0.02017, 0.06982], excludes 0). The control is BEATEN: survival-fitness selection raises cross-agent MII (0.172) above the matched comm-blind control (0.127) = selection FOR communication, not mere descent-convergence. SCOPE (load-bearing limitation): the population collapses to ~1 founder lineage, so this is KIN-LINEAGE (within-family) channel co-evolution, NOT yet a demonstrated public cross-lineage shared language.
